headline: Private-Credit Stocks Sink to New Lows
summary: Shares of some of the biggest private-credit managers dropped sharply Tuesday after Blackstone said outflows topped inflows by a record amount in its largest private-credit fund last quarter.  Blackstone shares dropped as much as 8.8% to trade down almost 50% from their 2024 all-time high.  Blue Owl shares also fell as much as 9%, dropping to more than 60% below a record from a little more than a year ago.

Blue Owl shares also fell as much as 9%, dropping to more than 60% below a record from a little more than a year ago.

headline: Largest Blackstone BDC hikes share repurchase limit to 7% as investors cash out
summary: Blackstone’s largest non-traded business development company announced it would hike its redemption limit and inject cash into a feeder fund to meet elevated requests to redeem shares. Blackstone Private Credit Fund (BCRED), the market’s largest BDC by AUM, raised its tender offer to 7% of shares, from 5%, according to a March 2 tender offer statement filed with the SEC. headline: Blackstone stock at 2023 low, MongoDB stock nosedives on earnings
summary: Morning Brief host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Tuesday morning's trending tickers and stories. Blackstone (BX) stock is trading at its lowest since 2023 amid continued concerns in the private credit market. anduril Activist investor Elliott Management is investing another $1 billion in Pinterest (PINS). MongoDB (MDB) stock is nosediving after the company reported mixed fourth quarter results. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Morning Brief.

headline: Blackstone Sees Record Redemptions From Private Credit Fund
